ClientSideComponent.Name: Scrum App
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"f59c8dbf-b0e4-4868-b93f-74d4f2b28ac3","alias":"ScrumAppHostWebPart","componentType":"WebPart","version":"1.0.0","manifestVersion":2,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart","SharePointFullPage"],"supportsThemeVariants":false,"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"5c03119e-3074-46fd-976b-c60198311f70","group":{"default":"Advanced"},"title":{"default":"Scrum App"},"description":{"default":"Hosts the Scrum application as a SharePoint full-page app."},"officeFabricIconFontName":"Page","properties":{"appBaseUrl":"","apiBaseUrl":"","tokenStorageKey":"scrum-app.sharepoint.token","userStorageKey":"scrum-app.sharepoint.user","useHashRouting":true}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["HTTPS://SPCLIENTSIDEASSETLIBRARY/"],"entryModuleId":"scrum-app-host-web-part","scriptResources":{"scrum-app-host-web-part":{"type":"path","path":"scrum-app-host-web-part_581a655517cc1a77126f.js"},"@microsoft/sp-core-library":{"type":"component","id":"7263c7d0-1d6a-45ec-8d85-d4d1d234171b","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-webpart-base":{"type":"component","id":"974a7777-0990-4136-8fa6-95d80114c2e0","version":"1.22.2"},"@microsoft/sp-property-pane":{"type":"component","id":"f9e737b7-f0df-4597-ba8c-3060f82380db","version":"1.22.2"},"ScrumAppHostWebPartStrings":{"type":"path","path":"ScrumAppHostWebPartStrings_en-us_a1482c0c67b98abb2b7068dbeabdaf2d.js"}}}}
